audit_items.proof_trace: The zero guard at L174-176 (`if (usdPrice == 0) revert Errors.ZeroFeedData()`) is applied after all decimal scaling on every iteration of the verified-reports loop, with no bypass paths. Negative prices are rejected upstream by SafeCast.toUint256(), and prices that round to zero via downscaling (feedDecimals > 18) are also caught by the same guard before storage. The property holds unconditionally for all reachable inputs.
